name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Bamboo 1947 series small bamboo handbag. The Gucci Bamboo 1947 series handbags ingeniously incorporate unique designs such as handcrafted bamboo handles, buckles, and mirrors (encased in leather), showcasing the brand's classic style and exquisite craftsmanship. Visit designated stores or experience exclusive selection with the assistance of a client advisor. Red patent leather, gold-tone bamboo hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket; one open pocket with mirror, web strap length: 81-125cm; leather strap length: 99-111cm, bamboo handle (11cm high), web strap height: 41-64cm; leather strap height: 50-58cm, bamboo buckle closure, weight: approx. 0.9kg.

Model: 675797.
Dimensions: 15(L) x 21(W) x 7cm(T)
Color: Red patent leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
Model height: 176cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods earbuds, small wallet, and lipstick
